title: Vegan Croatian Flatbread
description: A simple flatbread recipe from Croatia, adapted to be vegan, using garlicky flavors.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the dough, garlicky oil, garlic, salt, sugar, and warm water. Mix until a smooth dough forms.
2. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes elastic.
3. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
4. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
5. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on the desired size.
6. Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
7. Place the flatbread in the skillet or griddle and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
8. Brush with additional garlicky oil and serve.
